hooks.command: FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE"; if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\.|\.pem$|\.key$|id_rsa|id_ed25519|\.claude/settings\.json'; then echo 'BLOCK: Protected file. Manual edit required for secrets/config files.'; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT="$TOOL_INPUT"; if [ -n "$INPUT" ]; then if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ASIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{48}|xox[bpoas]-[a-zA-Z0-9-]+|eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*'; then echo 'BLOCK: Hardcoded secret/token detected. Use environment variables.'; exit 2; fi; fi
echo '[AgentShield] File modified. Run: npx ecc-agentshield scan'

cd "$PROJECT_DIR" # [REMOVED: error suppression] || exit 0; ISSUES=''; SECRETS=$(git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM --name-only # [REMOVED: error suppression] | xargs grep -lE 'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{48}|xox[bpoas]-|BEGIN.*PRIVATE' # [REMOVED: error suppression]); if [ -n "$SECRETS" ]; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}WARNING: Possible secrets staged: ${SECRETS} "; fi; LOGS=$(git diff --cached --name-only # [REMOVED: error suppression] | xargs grep -lE 'console[.]log|debugger' # [REMOVED: error suppression]); if [ -n "$LOGS" ]; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}WARNING: Debug artifacts in staged files: ${LOGS} "; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "$ISSUES"; fi
